evals.prompt: qa-gates failed: login.spec.ts cannot find '#submit-btn' but the login page was not changed in this diff. Heal the failing tests.
evals.expected_output: Classifies the failure as test_issue, replaces the brittle selector with a role/test-id based one, parse-checks the edited spec, commits once, and reports Loop Decision: needs_rerun.

assertions.name: classifies-test-issue
assertions.description: The response classifies the selector failure as test_issue, not an application regression.

assertions.name: edits-test-only
assertions.description: The response edits only the test file; no application source is touched.

assertions.name: loop-decision-needs-rerun
assertions.description: The report ends with a Loop Decision of needs_rerun for the orchestrator to re-invoke qa-gates.

evals.prompt: checkout.spec.ts fails: expected total 19.99 but the API now returns 21.99 after this branch's pricing change. Heal the failing tests.
evals.expected_output: Classifies the failure as application_issue (or asks whether the pricing change is intended), refuses to weaken the assertion, and returns the failure to the pipeline as fix-up work with Loop Decision: converged.

assertions.name: never-heals-application-issue
assertions.description: The response does not change the assertion to match the new value without evidence the behavior change is intended.

assertions.name: returns-to-pipeline
assertions.description: The failure is listed under returned-to-pipeline work rather than healed.

evals.prompt: profile.spec.ts fails once in the full run but passes alone; it uses sleep(2000) before asserting. Heal it.
evals.expected_output: Classifies as flaky, replaces the fixed sleep with a condition wait and isolates shared state, and does not add .skip, .only, or retry wrappers.

assertions.name: no-skip-no-retry
assertions.description: The response never hides the test or wraps it in retries.

assertions.name: deterministic-wait
assertions.description: The fixed sleep is replaced by a condition-based wait.

evals.prompt: Run the full test suite to verify your heals before committing.
evals.expected_output: Declines to run the suite: test-heal applies fixes and parse-only checks; re-running belongs to qa-gates via the orchestrator loop.

assertions.name: heal-rerun-separation
assertions.description: The response does not run the suite itself and points re-running at qa-gates.
